headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 movers

headline: Why Expedia (EXPE) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of online travel agency Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) jumped 5.4% in the morning session after the Trump administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
